All Classes All Packages

E

email - Variable in class model.User
User's email address (non-empty string)
Event - Class in model
Describes an event in the database
Event(String, String, String, int, int, String, String, String, int) - Constructor for class model.Event
 
EventDao - Class in dataaccess
Handles all database operations for events
EventDao() - Constructor for class dataaccess.EventDao
 
eventID - Variable in class model.Event
Unique identifier for this event (non-empty string)
EventIDRequest - Class in request
Returns a single Event object of a specified ID
EventIDRequest() - Constructor for class request.EventIDRequest
 
EventIDResult - Class in result
Reports success or failure
EventIDResult() - Constructor for class result.EventIDResult
 
EventIDService - Class in service
Handles the functionality of retrieving of a single event
EventIDService() - Constructor for class service.EventIDService
 
EventRequest - Class in request
Returns ALL events for ALL family members of the current user (current user is found by the auth token)
EventRequest() - Constructor for class request.EventRequest
 
EventResult - Class in result
Reports success or failure
EventResult() - Constructor for class result.EventResult
 
EventService - Class in service
Handles the functionality of retrieving all events of all family members
EventService() - Constructor for class service.EventService
 
eventType - Variable in class model.Event
Type of event (birth, baptism, christening, marriage, death, etc.)
